since_last: 66% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +6.01%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.82% · BTC -2.65% · Gold +0.59% · Nasdaq100 +1.76%. 66% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +6.01%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +6.01%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +28.00%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +28.00%, AVAV +17.83%, CEVA +10.78%, KLAC +9.19%, VRT +8.69%. Laggards: DLR -5.13%, HON -4.79%, TLN -4.72%, PINS -4.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.39% at $169.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.39% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
